properties.name: ignore_http_errors

block.comment: The product price in stripe is not the same as defined in Salesforce, so the new one will be created on Stripe and linked to the product (2 steps process)
This step avoid a duplication of the product price in Stripe if the default one is the same than the price defined is Salesforce. In that case, only the product information are updated

block.comment: Means that the Product in Salesforce is already linked with a product in Stripe
Means the product is not linked with a product in Stripe. A new field has been defined in Salesforce to store the Stripe reference of the product : "StripeProductId"
